name: Catherine Gabel
subject: Fwd: Mike Pence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I have two words for how this message from Sherrod made me feel Peter: Fired. Up. We need to keep Sherrod fighting like hell for us in the Senate. And that means we need to fight like hell to re-elect him this fall. You can help by [**chipping in toward his first FEC end-of-quarter goal of the general election.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff94c/4462dc26/50870520/2007b435/2725577312/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIwcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180620pm?refcode=sbe180620pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thanks for everything, team! -- Catherine
Sent from my iPhone. _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Sherrod Brown
Subject: Mike Pence_ |
---
Peter -- **Vice President Mike Pence wants me out of the Senate.**
He and the president are all-in for my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci.
Pence will say what he wants. Renacci will run all the attack ads he likes. And special interests will likely spend millions.
And there's only one way I can fight back: **Your support.** With the help of this grassroots team, we can reach the hardworking Ohioans who will decide the outcome of this election.
[**I need your help. And Peter, by "help," I mean a few bucks. We've got about 24 hours left to fill our Emergency Response Fund. If you can, give now.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff94c/4462dc26/50870520/2007b435/2725577312/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIwcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180620pm?refcode=sbe180620pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

name: Team Kasich
subject: This isn't over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Why should you still speak out and take action with the same intensity? Because this isn’t a real solution! [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=d9d02f4ae897469d8dc06c4aa33fc38c&_e=SkRqxftKuX-TNTHY8xkMYkV0ztvN9QxaHBnLrBgVtcUeXsMHIjS8OfLV6YiWKOMWfICCdh-_2di45RVp6mmUfyVl64HbZ2nJ_A0XDgvvewTJkMX26XnjmdDvH-G0aVVHgPRZ5CLuamzV3AnKUkzFq2pBGdHKPnrGZP2w9d6svVsWmZAWmpEiinw-6m51lxnkfmaRHjuK6JHYPYSK_BIkgGswdnHSi8od3PJOJQB37rUf1FeJqurnYvaKQeadePquIHO12UUOQN82aA__G_B3-A%3D%3D) | |
---
We are pleased to see that the President reversed his misguided decision and has taken some steps to end his policy of separating children from their parents at the border but this issue is a long way from resolved.
Peter, your voice made a difference. It really did. Americans from all walks of life joined together to speak out against the administration's policy.

**Why should you still speak out and continue to take action with the same intensity?**
**Because this isn’t a real solution!

**

Those children may now be allowed to remain with their parents while they’re detained, but may still be separated if they are denied asylum. And nearly 2,500 children have been taken from their parents and must be returned immediately.
**It’s critical that we keep up the pressure and keep pushing this administration and Congress** to offer real, meaningful solutions that both secure our border and demonstrate America’s moral character. We are so much better than this.
There has been an overwhelming amount of support for Gov. Kasich’s message this week and we need to continue to support it. [**Please consider chipping in whatever you can to help us get this to more people and drive change**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=d9d02f4ae897469d8dc06c4aa33fc38c&_e=SkRqxftKuX-TNTHY8xkMYhId8nmSyTC163-PjsSLNGXHs4vIRuKrjYWaz-wnlSw63zvSmwzwPgt_u5kc2IsXWNYRgpNaIXfhokVKkUd1uWPkpKhdbL7wc4lPKymhKf6pQ9t26f8L2qaU0H3yiS3p8eWPWqcbwE1bKHaLFfPaRyPSeqExshAwVsrAzErOaIqaK8svh1k-Ns9mRHGfDdR9sG9V5IZ2YCbPtw2-UMoglCuV6pg_CeRxdzmWZNIxjhsNZyyU1VWrFh2YNfsi3BFFGg%3D%3D).
[ **DONATE >** ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=d9d02f4ae897469d8dc06c4aa33fc38c&_e=SkRqxftKuX-TNTHY8xkMYhId8nmSyTC163-PjsSLNGXHs4vIRuKrjYWaz-wnlSw6_R02urVB7q9L9LGVgcGJXobeinOF0JkX8FVjc0BnFLWZwNKES7OEeVeMA_tzw9KgzckyIRq0LN8LfyGMxMPIXHYuH5NIy3d1ZTbwQBm45urI5xvYj3q8dYwpE4XZhd4-imdX07X_zJjwB8aaSHgW0Qf9d7YnxEmNlKeu8ZuNIV44Qv3QpOPiPDofrrVBdju5tIwf2AI31hJPToxLrTPf3w%3D%3D)
Thank you for all that you’re doing.

-Team Kasich

name: Steve Chabot
subject: America First?
body:
America First? No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [America First?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-j/)
There are basically two schools of thought on whether President Trump's "America First" strategy is the way to go. I'm discussing both in my blog this week and giving you my opinion on the strategy. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Here's My Advice to President Trump on North Korea (for what it's worth)](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-d/)
For the last year and a half or so, President Trump's critics have been warning that he was going to trigger World War III by his overly aggressive tactics towards North Korea. Then, surprising nearly everyone, President Trump and Kim Jong Un agreed to meet this week. So I'm blogging this week on my thoughts about where they go from here. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Could This Actually Be a Pretty Good Election Cycle for Republicans?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-u/)
We've been hearing an awful lot about the coming "blue wave". But while The Left and their friends in the media talk about it, Republicans in Congress along with the President have been getting real things done for the American people. Which leads me to wonder, could this actually be a pretty good year for Republicans? Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [About As Different As You Can Get](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-n/)
There's a lot to talk about in a typical race for a congressional seat. Using the First Congressional District of Ohio for example, there are a great many differences between my opponent, Democrat Aftab Pureval, and myself. Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-p/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-m/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-c/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjllllo-kujkulhluu-a/)

I'm discussing both in my blog this week and giving you my opinion on the strategy. Click below to read more. Previous Weekly Posts For the last year and a half or so, President Trump's critics have been warning that he was going to trigger World War III by his overly aggressive tactics towards North Korea. Then, surprising nearly everyone, President Trump and Kim Jong Un agreed to meet this week. So I'm blogging this week on my thoughts about where they go from here. Click below to read more. We've been hearing an awful lot about the coming "blue wave". But while The Left and their friends in the media talk about it, Republicans in Congress along with the President have been getting real things done for the American people. Which leads me to wonder, could this actually be a pretty good year for Republicans? Click below to read more in this week's blog. There's a lot to talk about in a typical race for a congressional seat. Using the First Congressional District of Ohio for example, there are a great many differences between my opponent, Democrat Aftab Pureval, and myself. Click below to read more in this week's blog. | | | ---|---|--- 2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211

name: Peter Joffrion for Congress
subject: From Kerry Joffrion - Speaking as a Mother
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61077/images/PJlogo.png]

Dear Mothers of the Campaign and Neighbors,

I am writing you this note over a cup of coffee in my kitchen, asking you to join me.

I write in a spirit of friendship and with a breaking heart for the load our babies are bearing at the border. I feel the sorrow, disbelief, and moral outrage you feel. I feel the shock. This is not the America I recognize. The voices of the children on the audio and the cries of babies being “processed away” from their mothers kept me awake in the night and compelled me to write you directly. Their tiny cries haunt my mind.

A mother’s love for her child is inviolate. There is no degree of separation or journey she can make without her child and make it intact. The perilous journey these border mothers are making is often borne out of abject suffering, abuse, neglect, and hunger. Many of them are fighting and fleeing for their lives and the lives of their babies. The dark abyss we are being drawn into of the “Tender Care Shelters” is a diversion from the criminality going down in Washington. I, as a Mom, will not take the bait.

State Governors are pulling their National Guards, mothers are unable to breast feed their weeks old babies, the children's night terrors are inconsolable, the trauma the children and fathers are facing is irreparable, the outcry of the nation is increasing by the hour, and Joseph is listening to the Angel and packing up Mary and Baby Jesus while we speak, but today it is just south of McMinnville. "Suffer the children, come unto me... for such is the Dominion of Heaven," said Jesus (MT 19:14).

Just stopping this with an Executive Order will not be enough to protect the more than 2,300 children already jailed, and it will not be enough to protect us all. We must find ways of reuniting our families.

As a minister and a Mom, I believe that we must don the Warrior’s Cloak and fight for the children. Join me in resisting this very present danger to all families, who are also our families. Oust leaders who criminalize children and get to the polls on November 6th as if your life and the lives of the children depend on it... because they do.

Come see us soon!

Your Friend,
Kerry

Rev. Kerry Holder Joffrion,
Peter Joffrion Campaign
US Congress 2018

Peter Joffrion for Congress
P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/84340af3-ff74-e811-80c2-00155dc33681/fe8134a1-4a75-e811-80c2-00155dc33681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTgxMzRhMS00YTc1LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HPsCewHj4RflrXDFYCswt_fvUt5Oxia5K20XkkUkWac=&id=110339827&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

name: The White House
subject: Enforcing the law while keeping families together
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f581b411952d6414d04783eeda43cb7574a7845482e1c4321110149f32066fcc50be6160cb3126a6e303939d5faa21ce20ffd3de385f9908) The White House • June 21, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will host a meeting of his Cabinet, focusing on much-needed government reorganization and Civil Service reform across Federal agencies. |
---
|

## Enforcing the law while keeping families together
**President Trump signed an executive order yesterday** to keep families together while they face any criminal improper entry or immigration proceedings involving their members. "We're going to have strong -- very strong borders, but we're going to keep the families together," the President said from the Oval Office. "I didn't like the sight or the feeling of families being separated. It's a problem that's gone on for many years."
**This executive order** allows the Administration to continue to protect the border with its zero-tolerance policy while avoiding the separation of illegal alien families, to the extent the President can legally do so. Attorney General Jeff Sessions will seek an immediate modification of the _Flores_ settlement agreement, which prevents Immigration and Customs Enforcement from detaining families together for more than 20 days.
**"We believe it's a false choice** between whether we are a country of law and order, a country with borders, and a country that demonstrates the compassion and the heart of the American people," Vice President Mike Pence said at the signing.
**"We ask Congress to do their part,"** Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen said. Congressional Democrats have so far refused, preferring not to undermine their larger agenda of open borders. Yesterday, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) refused to do his job, saying "legislation is not the way to go here."
[Learn more about enforcing the law while keeping families together.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f581b411952d64141c7397d2a8da8e2657306846a2417fabe52bef914f368b528ef2e9f2f263c060d2c943c258f71d93731bf32fcaca55a3)
**Watch** : [President Trump signs the executive order addressing family separation ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f581b411952d64141024fd0fd24ed74a7573d8d44190862fefad6446daebc1e12ba05b3851cd18c22f56aa41bbdc60e54125b5c58baf04b1)
---
|

## Manufacturers: 'This record optimism is no accident'
**The President joined mining and steel workers** in Duluth, Minnesota, yesterday to discuss how the Trump Administration is taking up their cause and getting people back to work. Earlier in the day, news broke that U.S. manufacturer confidence had surged to a [20-year record high](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f581b411952d6414200c2be30a0d2c618e99380b6f457a24e3cd30da586971b8d150b258d5aaee0bb2ce4058b7a4f040a12c80cba3e36207): A stunning 95.1 percent of manufacturers surveyed said they have a positive outlook for their companies.
**"This record optimism is no accident** ," said Jay Timmons, President of the National Association of Manufacturers. "It is fueled by the game-changing tax-reform passed six months ago."
**Iron mining is important work in Minnesota** --a $3 billion industry. Raw iron is mined from northern Minnesota's Iron Range, where it is then transported via the Duluth seaport to steel refineries throughout the United States and world. Through "America First" economic and trade policies, the Administration is giving these industries new life.
[See President Trump address mining and steel workers in Minnesota. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f581b411952d64144cd4dbf742d399b1c403edb882bf146e66b06df0d6186481bc75f91f24585ae0b8f97781a09c863f345c88183cf49129)
**More** : [How the Administration is confronting China's unfair trade policies ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd0d47edf80b9e4d426bd4c64fa0f8032cda12a35a46c9b2dfbd51f42bb1f7f75cae31aff541b28ae1d2a3ae46209b85a47b825d649648d)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump, joined by Vice President Mike Pence and Secretary of Homeland Security Kirstjen Nielsen, signs an executive order affording Congress an opportunity to address family separation** | June 20, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd0d47edf80b9e4d15189b8aa0e7c4d8aad76bccaee9078570cb1835fdcbeda79430209943f1a49e7b112691b3b799592b458135c290e8a) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd0d47edf80b9e4559bddf32fd22d1bd8d83eea7c11db65fb8fd6120f0f6e857a2a7e00315322692a3dfa8f1b704a0a4fc5ec2a9a47dbfd) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d47d20a5658e82cdc5607b348d332e8aaa5f49d4fa877d3b12e5d0745d5fb46da51c38b9b629c8cd28b66aa387c3692369004657b642f8a221)
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: The soul of Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
This election is about so much more than me or my opponent: I firmly believe this is a race for the soul of Virginia. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | Derek,

**This election is about so much more than me or my opponent: I firmly believe this is a race for the soul of Virginia.** This is a race for our values. Is Virginia for lovers or haters? Do we still believe in equality? This year's results will answer those questions - and I'm going to do everything I can to make sure our Commonwealth comes down on the right side of history on Election Day.

A big Democratic win here in Virginia would do even more than help our party take back the House and the Senate. It would prove once and for all that the dark and dangerous emotions stoked by my opponent's campaign do not represent Virginia's values, or America's values.

**Derek, if you believe in the positive,_Virginia for all_ vision my campaign values, chip in any amount to show your support.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1388/3e0906/6bd09366/3e3463f5/1371636783/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180621_1_FR_TK_MMD-TK_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180621_1_FR_TK_MMD-TK&source=20180621_1_FR_TK_MMD-TK")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1388/3e0906/6bd09366/3e3463f4/1371636783/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20180621_1_FR_TK_MMD-TK_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20180621_1_FR_TK_MMD-TK&source=20180621_1_FR_TK_MMD-TK")

---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1388/3e0906/6bd09366/3e3463ca/1371636783/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180621_1_FR_TK_MMD-TK_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20180621_1_FR_TK_MMD-TK&source=20180621_1_FR_TK_MMD-TK")
---
In 2017, Virginia's elections sent a message of hope to the whole country. Let's do it again in 2018 by clearly rejecting the politics of division and embracing my positive vision of a Virginia that works for all.

I have a big deadline coming up, the first since I've had an opponent. We have an ambitious goal for the month because, frankly, we aren't taking this race or my opponent for granted.

**But I need your help to meet this goal, Derek. If you haven't donated yet this month, it's a great time to step up. Let me know if you can.**

Thank you,

_Tim_

name: Barzee for Congress
subject: (Un)happy anniversary!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/yjlozDUCLvCUcmEU2aE6794uSdXyMKqF5qfpf1rCRzE=/GDQ2neEbvsTeVV_qsSo5Z_MohJyycl4ewnKyExOg1u8=?refcode=180621-email) This week there was an anniversary but it was nothing to celebrate: **it 's been 6 months since the awful, no-good, very bad Republican tax scam passed**. We can thank President Trump, Rep. Paul Ryan and Rep. Diaz-Balart for their work on this bill that harms the working and middle classes and gives the top 1% an enormous boost they don't need. [Enough is enough! We need policies that help the majority of Americans, not just the richest people in the world. Chip in $20 now for change>>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/yjlozDUCLvCUcmEU2aE6794uSdXyMKqF5qfpf1rCRzE=/GDQ2neEbvsTeVV_qsSo5Z_MohJyycl4ewnKyExOg1u8=?refcode=180621-email&amount=20) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/yjlozDUCLvCUcmEU2aE6794uSdXyMKqF5qfpf1rCRzE=/GDQ2neEbvsTeVV_qsSo5Z_MohJyycl4ewnKyExOg1u8=?refcode=180621-email) The average tax cut in Florida for families in the bottom 80% is a measly $547. For the top 1%, it's an eye-popping $98,480. Think of all of the families whose lives would change with that amount of money. [We need to get rid of this tax scam and put in tax reform that benefits Americans who actually need it. Mary will stand up for the working and middle class. Donate $20 now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/yjlozDUCLvCUcmEU2aE6794uSdXyMKqF5qfpf1rCRzE=/GDQ2neEbvsTeVV_qsSo5Z_MohJyycl4ewnKyExOg1u8=?refcode=180621-email&amount=20) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate: $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/yjlozDUCLvCUcmEU2aE6794uSdXyMKqF5qfpf1rCRzE=/GDQ2neEbvsTeVV_qsSo5Z_MohJyycl4ewnKyExOg1u8=?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=180621-email) [Express Donate: $10](https://act.myngp.com/el/yjlozDUCLvCUcmEU2aE6794uSdXyMKqF5qfpf1rCRzE=/GDQ2neEbvsTeVV_qsSo5Z_MohJyycl4ewnKyExOg1u8=?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=180621-email) [Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/yjlozDUCLvCUcmEU2aE6794uSdXyMKqF5qfpf1rCRzE=/GDQ2neEbvsTeVV_qsSo5Z_MohJyycl4ewnKyExOg1u8=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=180621-email) [Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/yjlozDUCLvCUcmEU2aE6794uSdXyMKqF5qfpf1rCRzE=/GDQ2neEbvsTeVV_qsSo5Z_MohJyycl4ewnKyExOg1u8=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=180621-email) [Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/yjlozDUCLvCUcmEU2aE6794uSdXyMKqF5qfpf1rCRzE=/GDQ2neEbvsTeVV_qsSo5Z_MohJyycl4ewnKyExOg1u8=?express_lane=true&refcode=180621-email) Thank you,

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: personally asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hey there -
**_The Washington Post_ just reported that Nevada is Democrats' "best pickup opportunity" - and that we have no room for error in the fight for Senate control.**
**Democrats need to go all-in in Nevada, especially with President Trump coming to fundraise for Dean Heller this weekend.** And with a recent poll showing us neck and neck with GOP extremist Dean Heller, this is shaping up to be one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country.
There's no doubt about it: If you're a Democrat who cares about taking back the Senate and protecting Obamacare and the future of the Supreme Court, then we need you with us now. Democrats _cannot_ take back the Senate if we lose here in Nevada, **so we 've _got_ to hit every single one of our fundraising goals. Right now, a generous group of Democrats is MATCHING every donation until we meet our pre-primary goal, but we're still falling way short of meeting our goal.**
**[Team, I'm personally asking you to chip in whatever you can right now to DOUBLE your impact and help us make up our shortfall so we can flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate for Democrats:](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd775/4fbb2af3/7f22b05f/5e8b9c7a/1169507508/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azcyOC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk728-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Team Jealous
subject: Just the facts, plain and simple
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
This is stressful.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a664/7ab0e2c4/7f91881a/349b9ca0/1812009173/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0621A") We'll make this quick, trust us -- there's just five days left until the primary. So we're gonna hit you with some quick stats:
1. We're in a dead heat with our closest opponent.
2. 44% of voters are still undecided -- still!
3. Not only that, but Governor Larry Hogan has $9 million ready to go the minute the primary is over to make sure a blue wave doesn't wash over Maryland.

These are just the facts, plain and simple. If you want to win, and we know you do, we need you to make a last-minute investment in this campaign right now. [**We have five days left before the primary -- donate $5 or more right now to help Ben win!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a664/7ab0e2c4/7f91881a/349b9ca0/1812009173/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0621A") We're in the home stretch -- thanks for being there with us! Team Jealous P.S. -- You seem like you might prefer a GIF to give you an idea of the mood right now. This sums it up. [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a664/7ab0e2c4/7f91881a/349b9ca0/1812009173/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0621A") P.P.S. -- Adding to our stress is that today is the deadline to early vote here in Maryland. [**Find where you can early vote right here!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a664/7ab0e2c4/7f91881a/349b9ca3/1812009173/VEsC/ "https://elections.maryland.gov/voting/documents/2018_Early_Voting_Centers_web.pdf") | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a664/7ab0e2c4/7f91881a/349b9ca0/1812009173/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0621A")

* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Carollo?=
subject: 9 Days left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
We have done so much in the last quarter and we are hard at work to make sure things keep moving forward.

** We only have 9 days left to reach our Q2 goal!
------------------------------------------------------------

Before I ask for your support (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=endofq2&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=002d92bd98-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_06_21_01_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-002d92bd98-9291445) first I want to say how proud I am to work on this campaign. My best friend Ian has been hard at work talking to the people of CD6 and people are thrilled to see a politician they can trust, someone who won't take corporate PAC money, and who is willing to reach out and listen to people of all stripes.

It is just like FDR said:
"The test of our progress is not whether we add more to the abundance of those who have much it is whether we provide enough for those who have little."

We can't possibly help people without first hearing their problems and that is something our campaign wants to live up to. That said, we need your help. With the end of the quarter just over a week away we are still $7,000 short of our goal.

It is absolutely critical that we meet our fundraising goals because our finance reports signal to the world how strong our campaign is. The stronger we look at the end of the quarter the easier it will be to gain media attention and national support. That is why we are asking for you to contribute (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=endofq2&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=002d92bd98-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_06_21_01_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-002d92bd98-9291445) to our campaign today.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm going to keep fighting for the children and families who need our help. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0d8/c1f7015/683b2e25/1142c5b5/723635181/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180621_em-nd") Friends, I could spend every second between now and November refuting the mistruths, rants, and attacks Trump waged on us and our progressive values at last night's rally in Duluth. But I'm not going to do that. I'm going to keep fighting for the children and families separated at our border, the seniors who need lower prescriptions drug costs, and every person who is counting on me and my Democratic colleagues in the U.S. Senate to ensure Republicans don't take away their health care. Here's the truth though, friend: We still have an important fundraising deadline coming up in less than two weeks and we're falling short of where we need to be to hit our $50,000 end-of-quarter grassroots goal. This goal is crucial to ensuring our campaign stays on track, keeps organizing all over the state, and reaches every voter. That's why I'm asking: Can you make a contribution now and help get us back on track to hit this goal? Just click here to make a contribution now: **[https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/end-of-quarter-goal](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0d8/c1f7015/683b2e25/1142c5b6/723635181/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180621_em-nd&amount=10")** I want to continue to focus on what's important -- and not on fundraising. I know I can count on you. Tina **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0d8/c1f7015/683b2e25/1142c5b6/723635181/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180621_em-nd&amount=10")**
---

name: Jason Yates
subject: Guess how many Americans identify as Christians
body:
Peter,
It’s no secret that the number of self-identified Christians in the United States has declined in recent decades, but do you know by just how much it has declined?
In 1960, 92% of adults in the U.S. self-identified as “Christian.” Guess what the percentage is today? Click on one of the buttons below and see if your answer is correct!
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fdecline-of-christians-in-the-us%2F%3Fa%3D1&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180620qna01&n=1)
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fdecline-of-christians-in-the-us%2F%3Fa%3D2&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180620qna01&n=2)
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fdecline-of-christians-in-the-us%2F%3Fa%3D3&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180620qna01&n=3)
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fdecline-of-christians-in-the-us%2F%3Fa%3D4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180620qna01&n=4)
This is important information for us as Christians to be aware of in our country.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180620qna01&n=5)
©2018 My Faith Votes

clean_body: Peter, It’s no secret that the number of self-identified Christians in the United States has declined in recent decades, but do you know by just how much it has declined? In 1960, 92% of adults in the U.S. self-identified as “Christian.” Guess what the percentage is today? Click on one of the buttons below and see if your answer is correct! This is important information for us as Christians to be aware of in our country. United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

body:
I’ve reached out to you a lot lately. But, this is really important.
I’m not asking for money. **[What I need most is your advice.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTcyLTFiNGYzNGVjNWQ2ODQzNDliOTNmYTY2MzNlYzMwYmI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QubnJjYy5vcmcvZWxlY3Rpb24tZGF5LXN1cnZleS1udW5lcy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1QQUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsUHJvc3BlY3QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNjIxX1BBRS1HT1AzX0RldmluTnVuZXMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODA2MjFfVGhpc0lzSW1wb3J0YW50&K=QlyHlT0FIgyCqzYC3w9zCg)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Apparently I have a distinct voice
body:
|
---

| | Peter, my staff tells me I have a distinct voice. They're...not the first ones to bring that to my attention. But they are the first ones who want to make it a contest prize. You probably know by now that the end of June is the end of the FEC fundraising deadline. We're trying to raise $600,000 the way we usually do -- one average online contribution of $26 at a time. These goals are important. Not only because it's an election year, or because I'm being attacked, or because the special interest groups would probably give their substantial bank accounts to see me out of the Senate. It's important because hitting these goals allows us to fight for our values. Higher wages. Affordable healthcare. Workers' rights. We're short of our goal, and we have to reach it. So here's what we're going to do. [**If you give $5 or more toward our FEC goal, you'll be automatically entered for a chance to have me leave your outgoing voicemail message.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff940/4462dc26/5094c6dc/2007b529/2608275538/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIxYSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621a?refcode=sbe180621a_m_other&refcode2=3268183") We'll choose five winners at the end of the month. When your friends call and you can't answer, they'll hear me. You could even send them to voicemail on purpose, just to hear my dulcet tones. Sound good? Get your name in now: _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff940/4462dc26/5094c6dc/2007b528/2608275538/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIxYSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621a?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180621a_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff940/4462dc26/5094c6dc/2007b528/2608275538/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIxYSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621a?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180621a_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff940/4462dc26/5094c6dc/2007b528/2608275538/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIxYSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621a?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180621a_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff940/4462dc26/5094c6dc/2007b529/2608275538/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIxYSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621a?refcode=sbe180621a_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Good luck! name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Trump's latest attack on women
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | The Trump administration is once again chipping away at woman's rights with a sinister campaign to cut back the rights provided to us in Title X. | | | [Add your name to tell Trump: Stop the Title X Gag Rule!](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f37/622b7b5b/1b7c9b01/307b8002/2365071649/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180615b")
---
Instead of debating the merits of women's healthcare in the open, Trump and his team would rather use secretive rule changes to continue their war on women.
This new push isn't just about denying Planned Parenthood funds -- it's aimed at denying Title X funds to any clinic that provides, recommends, or refers women to abortion services. 200,000 women visit a Title X clinic each year.
Nearly two-thirds of women who go to Title X clinics like Planned Parenthood live below the poverty line. We need to fight so that all women, rich or poor, can have access to reproductive health.
**When Republicans openly attack Planned Parenthood, they lose.** People stand up. People resist.
We need you to stand up. Will you fight for our legacy?
[**_Today, I 'm asking you to join the grassroots movement to preserve Planned Parenthood's Title X funding._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f37/622b7b5b/1b7c9b01/307b8002/2365071649/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180615b")
Thank you for your activism,
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

subject: I'm petitioning the Texas Democratic Party to protect migrant families

---
Dear Peter, Today I [unveiled an emergency resolution for the Texas Democratic Party to oppose family separation and family detention](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1460728/7920290/-772751457?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWM2YTUyYS05MDc1LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTPOsZjLChCAGjBEjf7JndWobD34_DfmY2MoFZb9LZk=). This resolution is in response to the “zero-tolerance” policy initiated by Attorney General Sessions that resulted in the criminal prosecution of most migrants crossing the southern border. Although the White House issued a new Executive Order yesterday, the Administration continues to prosecute asylum seekers; separate parents from chidren; and hold migrants in deplorable conditions. As a party we need to take a strong and unequivocal stance against criminalizing the immigrant community. I will not wait to take action until I am elected - as a citizen of this great state I will continue to fight for basic human and civil rights and to defend the values that make our country a beacon of freedom. The resolution calls for the Administration to:
* end the unnecessary criminal prosecution of migrants to the United States, and the resulting separation of children from their parents;
* dismiss any criminal charges against those seeking asylum; and
* take immediate steps to reunite separated children with their parents outside of detention centers.

In addition it states that the Texas Democratic Party:
* opposes the militarization of our southern border, and calls on the Texas Governor to withdraw the National Guard from the border areas;
* opposes the detention or incarceration of immigrants in private for-profit prisons and detention centers, and calls on the Texas and United States governments to end their reliance on these entities;
* calls on Congress to immediately initiate reforms to federal immigration law to ensure that migrants are not subject to criminal prosecution.

Our party stands up for basic human rights while Republicans are profiting from the companies that run these centers. I know that by passing this resolution we are doing what’s right for our communities, our state and our country. [The complete resolution is available here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1460729/7920291/-772751457?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWM2YTUyYS05MDc1LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTPOsZjLChCAGjBEjf7JndWobD34_DfmY2MoFZb9LZk=). With love and respect, Mike P.S. The [Dallas Morning News](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1460730/7920292/1390836673?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWM2YTUyYS05MDc1LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTPOsZjLChCAGjBEjf7JndWobD34_DfmY2MoFZb9LZk=) recently revealed that several Republicans have received donations from the company operating immigration detention centers, including my opponent, Rep. Michael McCaul.

name: Rahsheim Wright
subject: Early voting ends Today at 8pm
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff38/767134fb/5f485e8a/433830fc/2217633093/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Kenyarn's note. Today is the last day for early voting and the polls close at 8pm tonight.**[Find your early voting site here.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff38/767134fb/5f485e8a/433830fd/2217633093/VEsE/ "https://elections.maryland.gov/voting/documents/2018_Early_Voting_Centers_web.pdf") ** Thanks for your support. We hope to see you at the polls! Rahsheim Wright Campaign Manager, Donna for Prince George's PS: Want to help out Team Donna? There is still time to [**sign up to become a volunteer poll worker on Election Day.**](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff38/767134fb/5f485e8a/433830fa/2217633093/VEsF/ "https://edwards.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/electiondaypolls") **\--------Forwarded Message--------** Hi , I hope your week is going well. I wanted to send you a note to remind you that you can vote early for Donna Edwards for County Executive until Thursday, June 21st at 8 pm. We need all hands on deck to help Donna win the race for Prince George's County Executive. **[Will you sign up to be a volunteer poll worker during the early vote period?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff38/767134fb/5f485e8a/433830fb/2217633093/VEsC/ "https://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** We're growing a movement made up of teachers, working families, and community leaders coming together to help make her vision a reality, and to ensure our county has the leadership it deserves. **[Join Team Donna and sign up to volunteer for the last few days of early voting.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff38/767134fb/5f485e8a/433830fb/2217633093/VEsD/ "https://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** Thank you for your continued support for Donna Edwards. See you at the polls! Kenyarn Maxfield Field Director, Donna For Prince George's
---

name: ALERT@bobcasey.com
subject: up against it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
**BREAKING NEWS: **

The Republican National Committee is hiring a record 500 field staff and sending them to battleground states, including Pennsylvania

Make sure Bob Casey has the resources to fight back: [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180621_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

We are only five months out from Election Day, and the Republican National Committee is taking no chances. They are breaking records, team, pouring field organizers into 27 states across the nation (including Pennsylvania) and adding 500 staffers to their payroll.

[**We can 't afford to get complacent -- can you rush $5 or more to defend Pennsylvania's Senate seat today?**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180621_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Big Republican spenders, including the Koch brothers and Mitch McConnell's political arm, have already bought ads in Pennsylvania, and the RNC has already knocked on thousands of doors, spreading lies about the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme. We need to make sure voters know the truth about Bob, so we need to do everything we can to compete with this Republican operation.

**We can take back the majority in the Senate this year, but only if we defend Democrats like Bob Casey who are up for re-election. Can you rush $5 or more to help keep Pennsylvania blue?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180621_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180621_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180621_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Endangered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
I knew this race wouldn't be a cakewalk -- that's why my team and I are putting in the work to earn every single vote. |
---

| | Peter, the pundits have been calling me **" endangered"** for some time now, and I found out last week that Mitch McConnell's super PAC is spending one million dollars to elect my opponent, GOP Rep. Mike Braun. I knew this race wouldn't be a cakewalk -- that's why my team and I are putting in the work to earn _every single vote._

**But we 're going to need your help to succeed. [Will you pitch in to help me prove the pundits wrong (again) and beat Republican Rep. Mike Braun in November?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e55/7377f838/3cb80573/51f924e8/2771246418/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-prove?refcode=20180621.1nd&amount=25")**

If we can't get it done, **_Mitch McConnell 's majority in the Senate will grow even larger._** And that'll mean _more_ tax cuts for the super wealthy, more attacks on affordable health insurance for folks with pre-existing conditions, and an all-out campaign to privatize Social Security and Medicare.

**With so much on the line, we just can 't afford to fall short this year -- we need all hands on deck. Can I count on you to help us out?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

name: Jeramey Anderson for Congress
subject: press release on immigration policy
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE June 21, 2018 Representative Anderson's Statement Regarding the Federal Government's Action on Immigration

| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
June 21, 2018
Representative Anderson’s Statement Regarding the Federal Government’s Action on Immigration Policy The recent events that led to our current border crisis did not happen overnight. The Zero Tolerance policy initiated by the Trump Administration used the lives of innocent children as an intentional attempt to put pressure on Congress to pass an unreasonable immigration bill. As a country, we should be ashamed of any leader who has a callous disregard for society’s most vulnerable. There is a difference between being tough and being inhumane and our elected officials know better. The fate of immigrants trying to get into the United States, as well as DREAMers who have been here, hang in the balance while those in Congress have refused to set aside partisan differences to fix our broken immigration system. Yesterday, President Trump signed an Executive Order to reverse his administration’s decision to enforce the separation of all children arriving at the border with a family member. This is far from the correction needed and our work does not end there. Congress must come together to draft legislation that protects our borders without violating human rights. I am committed to supporting immigration policies that are tough but fair at our southwestern border, while as a country we should not impede on the rights of migrants and their families seeking asylum. Throughout history, our country has mobilized humanitarian aid in many countries across the world, and there is no reason we cannot establish a border that acts both as a patrol and a center for humanitarian relief. There are practical solutions that do not include an expensive, ecologically damaging wall, and if our elected officials, like my opponent here in South Mississippi, refuse to quit playing the partisan blame game and putting party over people then we will continue to see more crisis like this in the future. #####

---

subject: Ready for Supreme Court decision season, Peter?

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4053/24c69fd9/19c2a7e7e/18804517/2213609915/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENER47N_digital_email_20180621_SMSNIFLA_inact&source=WQENER47N_digital_email_20180621_SMSNIFLA_inact")
---

Peter,

June is Supreme Court decision season.

Every week the justices announce new rulings on cases they've heard all year long.

And there's a particularly big case that we've been following, because it will have serious ramifications for women's rights -- _NIFLA v. Becerra_.

The outcome of this case could mean the difference between fake women's health centers being legally allowed to pose as real health care facilities OR making sure patients can get accurate information about the full range of their health care options -- including access to safe and legal abortion.

**We want to make sure you are the first to know when the Supreme Court issues a decision -- so text SUPREME to 47717, and we'll send you a text when the ruling comes out.**

Thanks,

Meg DiMartino
Digital Coordinator, EMILY's List

P.S. Not near your phone but want to make sure you're getting these updates? **[Sign up here.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4053/24c69fd9/19c2a7e7e/18804510/2213609915/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180620_email_SMSSCOTUS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Sign+up+here&utm_campaign=WQENER47N_digital_email_20180621_SMSNIFLA_inact&source=WQENER47N_digital_email_20180621_SMSNIFLA_inact")**

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: The Dumpster Fire Burned Bright This Past Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=immigration_duluth_fundraiser&n=1)
---
Friend -- In case you missed it, the Trump Administration spent this past week trying to defend its policy of indefinitely separating migrant children from their parents at the border. Trump signaled that he would sign an Executive Order ending the policy if Congress would give him funding for his billion-dollar border wall. He is holding children hostage. **That is not how Presidents act, that is how gangsters act.** Here in Minnesota, Donald Trump himself came to Duluth for a campaign rally and to speak in support of the PolyMet copper-nickel mines. Onstage shaking his hand was Jon Cherry, PolyMet CEO and personal contributor to the Tina Smith campaign. Meanwhile, Tina Smith was in Washington finalizing the details of the land swap deal that would give Cherry and PolyMet free reign to pollute our waterways and make away with the profits. **This corruption needs to end!** Richard Painter plans to bring ethics, responsibility, and action to Washington. He has released his Ethics Reform Package ([available here](https://www.painterminnesota.com/corruption_and_ethics?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=immigration_duluth_fundraiser&n=2)), and has vowed to author legislation that would prevent sulfide mining near **any waterways**. **Can you contribute and help Richard bring an end to the abuses of the Trump Administration and the complicit members of Congress who enable him?** [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=immigration_duluth_fundraiser&n=3) Thank you for your consideration, Painter For Minnesota

Trump signaled that he would sign an Executive Order ending the policy if Congress would give him funding for his billion-dollar border wall. He is holding children hostage. That is not how Presidents act, that is how gangsters act. Here in Minnesota, Donald Trump himself came to Duluth for a campaign rally and to speak in support of the PolyMet copper-nickel mines. Onstage shaking his hand was Jon Cherry, PolyMet CEO and personal contributor to the Tina Smith campaign. Meanwhile, Tina Smith was in Washington finalizing the details of the land swap deal that would give Cherry and PolyMet free reign to pollute our waterways and make away with the profits. This corruption needs to end! Richard Painter plans to bring ethics, responsibility, and action to Washington. name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Speak out against cruelty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Friends,
What happened at our southern border is unspeakably evil - an indefensible act of terror that, as a mother, an American and a human being, I cannot comprehend.
The thought of having my daughters ripped from my arms - with no idea as to when I might see them again - is absolutely sickening. And my heart is breaking for the horror and trauma that these children are facing, locked up in cages among strangers and left to fend completely for themselves.
The Trump administration's policy goes against everything our country stands for - America should be a beacon of hope for those in need, not a place of fear and terror. That's why I refuse to stay silent as Donald Trump tries to cover this up with an executive order that requests the ability to detain families indefinitely at the border and provides no clear solution to reunite children torn from their parents' arms with their families.
**We, as Americans, have a moral obligation to speak out against injustice and to stand up against the Trump administration 's continued attacks on immigrant families coming to this country for a better life.**
**Please, take a moment right now to join me and stand up against this moral injustice.[Sign the petition to tell Donald Trump: Do not indefinitely detain families at the border.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/stop_separating_families?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&code=shaheen-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fcjs-stop_separating_families%3Fcode%3Djtk857-ja-nd)**
Thank you for standing up for American values and speaking out,
Jeanne
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JR6lfRd5MplA8DSUE7Js8C2gvRsTGCJf&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

body:
I have some good news and some bad:
After a poll came out showing us trailing GOP Sen. Dean Heller by one point here in Nevada, _POLITICO_ said, "Democrats have almost no shot at winning back the Senate majority if Jacky Rosen can't defeat Sen. Dean Heller in the fall."
That's why this latest news from my team is so incredible: A generous group of donors has offered to match ****[every dollar donated before midnight tomorrow](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd70e/4fbb2af3/7f3f472a/5e8b9ffd/3417293699/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc4MC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk780-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**** to help us close the gap and hit our match goal. ****[(Click here to push us over the top and help us win in NV to flip the Senate blue.)](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd70e/4fbb2af3/7f3f472a/5e8b9ffd/3417293699/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc4MC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk780-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: why we ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I want to take a minute to explain why we ask for your support, and why it really does make a difference in this race.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63392d/1a8421e1/1a448a7b1/4bbd93c3/3192629752/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Friend, My team and I email you pretty frequently, updating you on our campaign's progress -- and yes, a lot of the time, we ask you for money. I have my biggest deadline of the year so far coming up in just over a week, so my team is going to be emailing you a bit more often than usual **[_(you can help us out here if you want to chip in early)_.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.21_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") So I want to take a minute to explain why we ask for your support, and why it really does make a difference in this race.** Running a successful campaign in a district as big as Arizona's First is always an expensive endeavor. We need to run an ambitious voter outreach program across all the communities in our district and put ads up on TV to make sure our message reaches every voter. **But this year is going to get especially expensive, because I was recently named the most endangered Democrat in the House -- so the far-right and their special interest donors are fighting to unseat me.** To win this race, we need to counteract the far-right's big money with your grassroots enthusiasm. Every [**small-dollar donation**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.21_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") helps us reach another voter -- at the doors, in the mail, and on the airwaves. But this year is going to get especially expensive, because I was recently named the most endangered Democrat in the House -- so the far-right and their special interest donors are fighting to unseat me. To win this race, we need to counteract the far-right's big money with your grassroots enthusiasm. Every "=" helps us reach another voter -- at the doors, in the mail, and on the airwaves. "=" | "=" | "=" | "=" ---|---|--- "=" | "=" | "=" Yours, Tom ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "=". ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

* Aggressively undermined our basic American values of equity, tolerance, and decency - which he's continued to do daily since voters rejected him in 2016.

**And now Joe Arpaio is running for U.S. Senate.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Democrat Donnelly, Obamacare & The Deciding Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Last weekend, Indiana Democrats said some pretty crazy things at their biennial convention in Indianapolis. But the craziest thing (and that’s... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/democrat-donnelly-north-korea-466917?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **Democrat Joe Donnelly Confirms the Worst:
_He Was The Deciding Vote Against Obamacare Repeal_**
---
|
---
| | Friends –

Last weekend, Indiana Democrats said some pretty crazy things at their biennial convention in Indianapolis. But the craziest thing (and that’s saying something) came when Democrat Joe Donnelly took to the stage. And he confirmed what we’ve alwasys suspected...
_**...Democrat Joe Donnelly was THE DECIDING VOTE on last year’s failed attempt to repeal Obamacare. **_
[With his “no” vote](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cf3c2ab650&e=1acd9bb3d6), Democrat Donnelly ensured that Hoosiers will continue to be saddled with Obamacare's rising premiums, lost coverage, and fewer insurance options.

**It’s time that we replace Democrat Donnelly with a true, consistent conservative who lives the values that he’s voting on in Washington...and who will vote to repeal Obamacare once and for all. **

---
| [SHARE ON FACEBOOK: DONNELLY WAS THE DECIDING VOTE](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cafd2d9b45&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SHARE ON FACEBOOK: DONNELLY WAS THE DECIDING VOTE")
---
| Conservative outsider Mike Braun wants to repeal this disastrous law. And he'll work to replace it with real, common sense soltions...like allowing Hoosiers to buy health insurance across state lines, and allowing small businesses to pool their resources to purchase insurance at lower rates (really increasing competition, and driving down cost for all).

**Let’s make sure that all Hoosiers know that it’s Democrat Joe Donnelly’s fault that Hoosiers (and for that measure, all Americans) are still living under Obamacare...and still dealing with fewer options, rising premiums, and continued health care chaos.**

[Share this message on Facebook today](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3e408c8cab&e=1acd9bb3d6), and let’s show Democrat Donnelly what we think of his deciding Obamacare vote!

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---

name: Team Scholten
subject: Dinner with J.D.?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
When we first started this campaign, nearly everyone said, “Steve King can’t be beat.”
_Then, in the final quarter of 2017, we outraised Steve King nearly 2-to-1._
People slowly started to come around to the point where we heard, “Maybe King can be beat, but it’s going to be an uphill battle all the way.”
_Then, in the first quarter of 2018, we significantly outraised him again, passing his fundraising totals for the entire campaign cycle!_
People started to look at this race a little differently. National groups endorsed our campaign and the Cook Political Report stated that this seat was suddenly “at risk”, thanks to our strong grassroots fundraising from people like you.
In ten days, we have a tremendous opportunity to propel this race forward yet again. **The current fundraising quarter ends on June 30 and, if we can outraise Steve King for the third quarter in a row, it will put the district, the state, and the nation on notice that this seat is definitely in play! **
That’s why we’re kicking off our most ambitious goal yet—**to raise $50,000 online over the last ten days of this quarter.** We’ve crushed every end-of-quarter goal we’ve set this year and, with your help, we can do it once again. [**_Click here to make a contribution to help us finally dethrone the King!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1461959/7925777/-749749768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2QxNGUwMi1iMTc1LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fo4R78HX5wAG0GM1MfXWBsCbIJembn9fbjfh7XPaQ7Q=)
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten
P.S. Oh yeah, about that dinner! **We’re giving away tickets to sit with J.D. this Saturday at the Iowa Democratic Hall of Fame Awards Dinner in Des Moines.** The dinner starts at 4:00, and the program starts at 5:00. If you’d like to enter the drawing, simply reply to this email with your phone number. We’ll notify the winners at noon on Friday!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1461960/7925778/-749749768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2QxNGUwMi1iMTc1LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fo4R78HX5wAG0GM1MfXWBsCbIJembn9fbjfh7XPaQ7Q=)

Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d37aa5a1-aa75-e811-80c2-00155dc33681/e3d14e02-b175-e811-80c2-00155dc33681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2QxNGUwMi1iMTc1LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fo4R78HX5wAG0GM1MfXWBsCbIJembn9fbjfh7XPaQ7Q=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213a5/4067b0a/65510eff3/7fbc5791/3942947974/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&source=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&refcode=em_20180621_dnc4_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213a5/4067b0a/65510eff3/7fbc579e/3942947974/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&refcode=em_20180621_dnc4_nd").

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by **06/21/18.** Enter by contributing **[here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213a5/4067b0a/65510eff3/7fbc579f/3942947974/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018-obama-contest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&source=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&refcode=em_20180621_dnc4_nd")** , or click **[here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213a5/4067b0a/65510eff3/7fbc579c/3942947974/VEsHAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/2018-obama-contest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&source=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&refcode=em_20180621_dnc4_nd")** to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, DC; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; two (2) admission tickets to Gala Dinner in LA featuring President Obama on Thursday, June 28, 2018; ground transportation to and from the airport at the Destination and ground transportation to and from the Barack Obama Gala Dinner in LA; Opportunity to meet and take photograph with Barack Obama. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213a5/4067b0a/65510eff3/7fbc579d/3942947974/VEsHAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/content/2018-obama-contest/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&source=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&refcode=em_20180621_dnc4_nd")** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213a5/4067b0a/65510eff3/7fbc579a/3942947974/VEsHAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&refcode=em_20180621_dnc4_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213a5/4067b0a/65510eff3/7fbc579b/3942947974/VEsHAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&source=em_20180621_dnc4_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Purchase/Contribution is not necessary to enter or win. Void where prohibited. Promotion ends 06/21/18. Approx. value of prize package: $5,000. Subject to **[Official Rules](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405213a5/4067b0a/65510eff3/7fbc5798/3942947974/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/content/2018-obama-contest/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&source=em_20180621_dnc4_nd&refcode=em_20180621_dnc4_nd")** & restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

name: Jerusalem Demsas
subject: Do you want to vote absentee?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Tomorrow's the deadline!

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a665/7ab0e2c4/7f90d91c/349b9d07/2022699927/VEsH/ "https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/OnlineVoterRegistration/InstructionsStep1") Friend, If you want to vote absentee in Maryland for Ben, tomorrow's a big deadline: **[Request and return your absentee ballot TOMORROW to cast your primary vote for Ben Jealous!](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a665/7ab0e2c4/7f90d91c/349b9d07/2022699927/VEsE/ "https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/OnlineVoterRegistration/InstructionsStep1")** You just need to fill out a quick form, and you can download your ballot in no time! But if you want to vote absentee, tomorrow's your last day to do it. **This will come down to every. last. vote.[If you think you might get caught up on Election Day, don't risk it -- just vote now!](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a665/7ab0e2c4/7f90d91c/349b9d07/2022699927/VEsF/ "https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/OnlineVoterRegistration/InstructionsStep1")** Thanks so much! Jerusalem Jerusalem Demsas
Deputy Communications Director
Ben Jealous for Governor
| [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a665/7ab0e2c4/7f90d91c/349b9d06/2022699927/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ0621B")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a665/7ab0e2c4/7f90d91c/349b9d01/2022699927/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a665/7ab0e2c4/7f90d91c/349b9d00/2022699927/VEsA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a665/7ab0e2c4/7f90d91c/349b9d03/2022699927/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a665/7ab0e2c4/7f90d91c/349b9d02/2022699927/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Emily
subject: sounding the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Sounding the alarm here, team: Donald Trump is campaigning for Dean Heller in Nevada SATURDAY and raising money this weekend to help swing this election Dean Heller's way.
**A recent poll showed that we 're down by one in the race to decide Senate control** - so in an election as close as this one will be, every single dollar could be the difference between winning and losing. That means that, if we're going to compete with Donald Trump's $50,000-a-couple fundraiser, we NEED our grassroots team to step up ASAP and show we can go toe to toe with the GOP.
**[Our team just crunched the numbers, and right now we're not raising enough to keep pace with Dean Heller and Donald Trump, so I'm counting on you to give whatever you can - even just $5 - to help push us over the top. _Every_ dollar will be matched.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd702/4fbb2af3/7f34cccf/5e8b9ab6/419454833/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk732-fr-nd")**
Thank you,
Emily
Finance Director

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd702/4fbb2af3/7f34cccf/5e8b9ab7/419454833/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd702/4fbb2af3/7f34cccf/5e8b9ab4/419454833/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd702/4fbb2af3/7f34cccf/5e8b9ab5/419454833/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax-deductible.

\-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Team - To turn Georgia blue, we knew we'd need to run a different kind of campaign -[**but the outpouring of support we've received has been astonishing. **](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaaba/34a064cc/8efc543/70f1e88/1295978261/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/building-momentum?refcode=IE062118UPDATE&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-++but+the+outpouring+of+support+weve+rece&utm_campaign=IE062118UPDATE&source=IE062118UPDATE") So far, more than 42,000 people have contributed to our movement for progress, and almost 6,000 new supporters have stepped up since the primary election. With an average online donation of around $50, everyone is doing what they can to lead Georgia forward. [**Team Abrams has the people power to win in November, and we need our June fundraising numbers to reflect the momentum we've built. **](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaaba/34a064cc/8efc543/70f1e89/1295978261/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/building-momentum?refcode=IE062118UPDATE&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3+-+Team+Abrams+has+the+people+power+to+win+&utm_campaign=IE062118UPDATE&source=IE062118UPDATE") **[Will you add your name today?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaaba/34a064cc/8efc543/70f1e96/1295978261/VEsC/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/building-momentum?refcode=IE062118UPDATEND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=4+-+Will+younbspadd+your+name+today&utm_campaign=IE062118UPDATE&source=IE062118UPDATE") **If we want to win in November, we need to keep building - and our first public deadline is next week. name: Bob
subject: I'm furious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6642/51dbcc2a/5f9d16b/3a414dc/2225859107/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

If you're angry, really angry, you're not alone.

The Trump administration's policies are divisive, cruel and don't reflect the values of our nation. And because Senate leadership follows the President without regard for the consequences, many of our best ideas for pushing back never even get a vote.

If we want a real check on President Trump, we need to take back the Senate in 2018. And if you ask any expert, they'll tell you that Democrats' path to the Senate majority depends on winning Pennsylvania in November.

**_[That's why I'm asking you for $5 today -- not just to re-elect me, but to secure a Democratic Senate to push back against the Trump administration's most dangerous policies.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180621_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

There are so many important bills that Mitch McConnell won't even bring to a vote. I'm cosponsoring bills that would lower prescription drug costs, keep guns out of the hands of people convicted of hate crimes and humanely address our immigration system. Those bills deserve a vote, but I'm not optimistic that they'll get one unless we take back the Senate in November.

**If you're as mad as I am, chip in $5 or whatever you can to protect this seat and help Democrats take back the Senate:**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180621_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180621_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
