When it comes to campaigns, it's vital to budget every cent you have in the door. If we have money sitting in the bank, that's money that could have been used to knock more doors, call more voters, and run more ads.

**But that also means it's a _big problem_ if we miss our budget goals. Falling behind, even for a week, throws all of our plans off, and it means we might miss out on crucial conversations with voters.

That's the problem we're facing right now**, but your support right now could put us back on track. Our weekly budget deadline is tonight, and we're still short over six thousand dollars. Take a look for yourself ->

| **Budget Goals (Online)** | **GOAL** | **LEFT TO RAISE**
---|---|---

**June 8-June 14** | $15,000 | COMPLETE
**June 15-June 21** | **$20,000** | **$6,345**

[Have you seen this?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=77dc23d635&e=bfe3be83a5)**Democrats are turning to Hollywood elites and billionaires to help promote their liberal agenda and silence our voices.**

[Will you chip in $20 today to stand with our conservative Hoosier values?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=375cab21d7&e=bfe3be83a5)
[](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=2aeb76aca1&e=bfe3be83a5)
Like you, I want to protect our borders, lower taxes for hardworking families, and help President Trump’s efforts to restore America’s strength at home and around the globe.

With far-left activists and the entertainment industry spending billions on advertising in attempt to put Nancy Pelosi back in the Speaker's chair, it is critical that we fight back to keep our district red. [Can we count on your support?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=68f859fe5d&e=bfe3be83a5)

Jim

name: Team Kaine
subject: Corey Stewart's troubling ties to anti-Semitism (long but important)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | _Derek - this is a long email, but it 's so important. Please read:_

**Who is Paul Nehlen?**

Paul Nehlen is a known anti-Semite and self-described "pro-white" candidate running in a Republican primary for Congress in Wisconsin. If you're on Twitter, you may know him from his anti-Semitic tweets - tweets that prompted even Steve Bannon and Breitbart News to cut ties with him. | [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f138b/3e0906/6b335bc5/3e3476a8/2716037090/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS&source=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS")
---
**" Ryan's 'pro-white' primary foe denounced by Breitbart after his anti-Semitic tweets"**
He also supported the white nationalist rally in Charlottesville that killed three people and injured dozens more.

**Why are we taking the time to talk about this despicable person?**

Because Corey Stewart called Paul Nehlen his "personal hero."

Seriously - video was posted to Stewart's own YouTube account. Remember, Nehlen is a guy who even *Steve Bannon* has disavowed.
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f138b/3e0906/6b335bc5/3e3476af/2716037090/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS&source=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS")
Stewart's ties to and praise for this known anti-Semite even drew attention in **Israeli news outlets like The Times of Israel and Haaretz.** Is this the Virginia we want the world to see?

Stewart says that he didn't know about Nehlen's beliefs at the time, but video recently emerged that shows he embraced Nehlen even AFTER his hatred became evident.
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f138b/3e0906/6b335bc5/3e3476ae/2716037090/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS&source=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS")
---
**" GOP Senate nominee Corey Stewart endorsed Paul Nehlen months after he shared white nationalist content"**
**These ties to a noted anti-Semite are profoundly troubling. Also troubling: Stewart is lying about his associations at every turn.**

[We simply cannot allow Corey Stewart to get anywhere near the United States Senate. If you're as horrified as we are, please consider making a donation right now to support Tim Kaine's re-election.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f138b/3e0906/6b335bc5/3e3476ad/2716037090/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+We+simply+cannot+allow+Corey+Stewart+to+&utm_campaign=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS&source=20180621_2_FR_TEAM_Oppo-AS")

Paul Nehlen is a known anti-Semite and self-described "pro-white" candidate running in a Republican primary for Congress in Wisconsin. If you're on Twitter, you may know him from his anti-Semitic tweets - tweets that prompted even Steve Bannon and Breitbart News to cut ties with him. | "" " Ryan's 'pro-white' primary foe denounced by Breitbart after his anti-Semitic tweets" He also supported the white nationalist rally in Charlottesville that killed three people and injured dozens more. subject: More on Mike Pence

body:
|
---

| | During his Ohio visit last week, Mike Pence made it incredibly clear: **He and President Trump want me out of the Senate.** Peter, I need your help. And yes, by help, I mean a contribution to my re-election campaign. The Emergency Response Fund will close at midnight tonight. Your response thus far has been amazing. With an average online contribution of $26, we've raised $14,874 in just a few days, but unfortunately, we're still $11,126 short. [**Can I count on you to rush in a $26 contribution now?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff947/4462dc26/50b3103e/2007ba5d/1064438209/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621pm?refcode=sbe180621pm_b&amount=26") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff947/4462dc26/50b3103e/2007ba5c/1064438209/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIxcG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180621pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff947/4462dc26/50b3103e/2007ba5c/1064438209/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIxcG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180621pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff947/4462dc26/50b3103e/2007ba5c/1064438209/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIxcG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180621pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff947/4462dc26/50b3103e/2007ba53/1064438209/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjIxcG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621pm?refcode=sbe180621pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** I'm up against attacks from President Trump and Vice President Pence. I need your help to reach Ohio voters and get our message out there. And with your help, one $26 average online contribution at a time, we can do just that. **[**Help us respond to Vice President Pence 's smears. Give what you can. **](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff947/4462dc26/50b3103e/2007ba5d/1064438209/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621pm?refcode=sbe180621pm_b&amount=26")** | | | [Donate $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff947/4462dc26/50b3103e/2007ba5d/1064438209/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180621pm?refcode=sbe180621pm_b&amount=26")

With gratitude,
Sherrod
